complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the webhook architecture documentation task into subtasks covering: 1) Overall architecture overview with diagrams, 2) API reference documentation with examples, 3) Integration guide for new webhook types, 4) Effect.ts patterns and error handling documentation, and 5) Security and testing documentation.

The complexity comes from needing to document multiple interconnected components (API endpoints, registry system, handlers), explaining advanced Effect.ts patterns, and creating clear integration guides. The task requires deep understanding of the entire webhook architecture implemented across tasks 58-64 to create accurate documentation.
